title: lotus dorycnium subsp. lagunae
intro: Lotus dorycnium subsp. lagunae, also known as the Lotus crested or Mediterranean crested clover, is a subspecies of the Lotus dorycnium plant that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lotus dorycnium subsp. lagunae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and other health concerns.
